reviews_detail.3: I recently purchased this black jeans that I was hoping would be a staple in my wardrobe. Unfortunately, my experience with these jeans has been nothing short of disastrous. After just one wash, the black dye began to bleed onto my other clothes, leaving them stained. Additionally, the color of the jeans themselves has faded significantly, making them look worn and cheap. I would strongly advise anyone considering purchasing these jeans to look elsewhere. They are simply not worth the money.
